overview.text: NSW DPI delivers programs covering agriculture, biosecurity, fisheries, forestry research, animal welfare, and emergency management for primary industries. It is now part of the NSW Department of Primary Industries and Regional Development (DPIRD).

items: Biosecurity and animal-disease response (e.g. fruit fly, varroa mite, lumpy skin disease preparedness).
Fisheries compliance — DPI Fisheries Officers regulate recreational and commercial fishing.
Plant health, weed management and biosecurity emergency response.
